title: Problem linking when using -cc -build
body:
Hi all,

I am trying to build a source tree which, as part of its build system, builds the example hello_world.v and tries to link it statically into a larger binary.  The build for the hello_world.v seems to finish and produce a .o and .a files, but when it comes time for the static linkage at the very end of the build, I see these:

``
ld -z max-page-size=0x1000 -T/home/jon/controlix/src/nuttx/nuttx/boards/x86_64/intel64/qemu-intel64/scripts/qemu.ld -L"/home/jon/controlix/src/nuttx/nuttx/staging" -L"/home/jon/controlix/src/nuttx/nuttx/arch/x86_64/src/board" -L "/usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/10/" \
	-o "/home/jon/controlix/src/nuttx/nuttx/nuttx.elf"  \
	--start-group -lgcc -lgcc_eh -lsupc++ --whole-archive --no-relax -lsched -lmisc -lzlib -lcxx -lcontrols -lcontrolix -ldrivers -lboards -lc -lmm -larch -lapps -lnet -lfs -lbinfmt -lboard --end-group
ld: /home/jon/controlix/src/nuttx/nuttx/staging/libcontrols.a(Vhello_world__ALL.o): in function `Vhello_world__Syms::~Vhello_world__Syms()':
Vhello_world__ALL.cpp:(.text+0x4d): undefined reference to `VerilatedModule::~VerilatedModule()'
Vhello_world__ALL.cpp:(.text+0x4d): relocation truncated to fit: R_X86_64_PLT32 against undefined symbol `VerilatedModule::~VerilatedModule()'
ld: /home/jon/controlix/src/nuttx/nuttx/staging/libcontrols.a(Vhello_world__ALL.o): in function `Vhello_world__Syms::Vhello_world__Syms(VerilatedContext*, char const*, Vhello_world*)':
Vhello_world__ALL.cpp:(.text+0xc8): undefined reference to `VerilatedSyms::VerilatedSyms(VerilatedContext*)'
Vhello_world__ALL.cpp:(.text+0xc8): relocation truncated to fit: R_X86_64_PLT32 against undefined symbol `VerilatedSyms::VerilatedSyms(VerilatedContext*)'
ld: Vhello_world__ALL.cpp:(.text+0xdb): undefined reference to `VerilatedModule::VerilatedModule(char const*)'
Vhello_world__ALL.cpp:(.text+0xdb): relocation truncated to fit: R_X86_64_PLT32 against undefined symbol `VerilatedModule::VerilatedModule(char const*)'
ld: Vhello_world__ALL.cpp:(.text+0xe9): undefined reference to `VerilatedContext::timeunit(int)'
Vhello_world__ALL.cpp:(.text+0xe9): relocation truncated to fit: R_X86_64_PLT32 against undefined symbol `VerilatedContext::timeunit(int)'
ld: Vhello_world__ALL.cpp:(.text+0xf7): undefined reference to `VerilatedContext::timeprecision(int)'
Vhello_world__ALL.cpp:(.text+0xf7): relocation truncated to fit: R_X86_64_PLT32 against undefined symbol `VerilatedContext::timeprecision(int)'
ld: Vhello_world__ALL.cpp:(.text+0x10e): undefined reference to `VerilatedModule::~VerilatedModule()'
Vhello_world__ALL.cpp:(.text+0x10e): relocation truncated to fit: R_X86_64_PLT32 against undefined symbol `VerilatedModule::~VerilatedModule()'
ld: Vhello_world__ALL.cpp:(.text+0x11b): undefined reference to `VerilatedSyms::~VerilatedSyms()'
Vhello_world__ALL.cpp:(.text+0x11b): relocation truncated to fit: R_X86_64_PLT32 against undefined symbol `VerilatedSyms::~VerilatedSyms()'
ld: /home/jon/controlix/src/nuttx/nuttx/staging/libcontrols.a(Vhello_world__ALL.o): in function `Vhello_world___024root::Vhello_world___024root(char const*)':
Vhello_world__ALL.cpp:(.text+0x1b): undefined reference to `VerilatedModule::VerilatedModule(char const*)'
Vhello_world__ALL.cpp:(.text+0x1b): relocation truncated to fit: R_X86_64_PLT32 against undefined symbol `VerilatedModule::VerilatedModule(char const*)'
ld: /home/jon/controlix/src/nuttx/nuttx/staging/libcontrols.a(Vhello_world__ALL.o): in function `Vhello_world___024root::~Vhello_world___024root()':
Vhello_world__ALL.cpp:(.text+0x27): undefined reference to `VerilatedModule::~VerilatedModule()'
Vhello_world__ALL.cpp:(.text+0x27): relocation truncated to fit: R_X86_64_PLT32 against undefined symbol `VerilatedModule::~VerilatedModule()'
ld: /home/jon/controlix/src/nuttx/nuttx/staging/libcontrols.a(Vhello_world__ALL.o): in function `Vhello_world__Syms::~Vhello_world__Syms()':
Vhello_world__ALL.cpp:(.text+0x56): undefined reference to `VerilatedSyms::~VerilatedSyms()'
Vhello_world__ALL.cpp:(.text+0x56): relocation truncated to fit: R_X86_64_PLT32 against undefined symbol `VerilatedSyms::~VerilatedSyms()'
ld: /home/jon/controlix/src/nuttx/nuttx/staging/libcontrols.a(Vhello_world__ALL.o): in function `Vhello_world___024root___initial__TOP__1(Vhello_world___024root*)':
Vhello_world__ALL.cpp:(.text.unlikely+0xb): undefined reference to `VL_WRITEF(char const*, ...)'
Vhello_world__ALL.cpp:(.text.unlikely+0xb): additional relocation overflows omitted from the output
ld: Vhello_world__ALL.cpp:(.text.unlikely+0x24): undefined reference to `VL_FINISH_MT(char const*, int, char const*)'
ld: /home/jon/controlix/src/nuttx/nuttx/staging/libcontrolix.a(main.cpp.o): in function `Verilated::lastContextp(VerilatedContext*)':
/home/jon/controlix/src/verilator_runtime/include/verilated.h:689: undefined reference to `Verilated::s_lastContextp'
ld: /home/jon/controlix/src/nuttx/nuttx/staging/libcontrolix.a(main.cpp.o): in function `Verilated::lastContextp()':
/home/jon/controlix/src/verilator_runtime/include/verilated.h:693: undefined reference to `Verilated::s_lastContextp'
ld: /home/jon/controlix/src/verilator_runtime/include/verilated.h:694: undefined reference to `Verilated::s_lastContextp'
ld: /home/jon/controlix/src/nuttx/nuttx/staging/libcontrolix.a(main.cpp.o): in function `Verilated::threadContextp()':
/home/jon/controlix/src/verilator_runtime/include/verilated.h:707: undefined reference to `Verilated::t_s'
ld: /home/jon/controlix/src/verilator_runtime/include/verilated.h:707: undefined reference to `Verilated::t_s'
ld: /home/jon/controlix/src/verilator_runtime/include/verilated.h:708: undefined reference to `Verilated::t_s'
ld: /home/jon/controlix/src/nuttx/nuttx/staging/libcontrolix.a(main.cpp.o): in function `__tcf_0':
/home/jon/controlix/src/verilator_runtime/include/verilated.h:712: undefined reference to `VerilatedContext::~VerilatedContext()'
ld: /home/jon/controlix/src/nuttx/nuttx/staging/libcontrolix.a(main.cpp.o): in function `Verilated::defaultContextp()':
/home/jon/controlix/src/verilator_runtime/include/verilated.h:712: undefined reference to `VerilatedContext::VerilatedContext()'
``

my main.cpp file:

``
#include "Vhello_world.h"
#include "verilated.h"

extern "C" void controlix_main(int argc, char** argv)
{
  vluint64_t main_time = 0;

  Vhello_world* hello_world = new Vhello_world;

  // "Hello, world!" test print loop
  while(!Verilated::gotFinish())
  {
    hello_world->eval();
    main_time++;
  }
``

Any ideas?  I am new to Verilator, so any help is much appreciated.  Is there an external -lverilator or something along that line that I need to link to the final binary?  I am working off a current pull of the git tree.
